ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host listing the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "location_exact" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is exact */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Apartment, House) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room available (e.g., Entire home/apt, Private room) */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds available */,
  "bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed (e.g., Real Bed, Sofa Bed) */,
  "square_feet" REAL /* Square footage of the property */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price per night */,
  "weekly_price" TEXT /* Weekly price */,
  "monthly_price" TEXT /* Monthly price */,
  "minimum_night_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum night stay requirement */,
  "maximum_night_stay" INTEGER /* Maximum night stay restriction */,
  "house_rules" TEXT /* House rules and regulations */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_response_time" TEXT /* Response time category for the host */,
  "host_response_rate" REAL /* Percentage of host responses to inquiries */,
  "host_acceptance_rate" REAL /* Percentage of host acceptance of bookings */,
  "host_is_superhost" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host is a superhost */,
  "host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of active listings by the host */,
  "host_total_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings by the host */,
  "host_verifications" TEXT /* Types of verifications completed by the host */,
  "host_has_profile_pic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host has a profile picture */,
  "host_identity_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host's identity is verified */,
  "host_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile picture */,
  "host_about" TEXT /* Host's about/bio information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity available at the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "has_availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is available for booking */,
  "availability_30" INTEGER /* Number of days available in the next 30 days */,
  "availability_60" INTEGER /* Number of days available in the next 60 days */,
  "availability_90" INTEGER /* Number of days available in the next 90 days */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days available in the next 365 days */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the availability period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the availability period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "review_scores_rating" REAL /* Overall rating score */,
  "review_scores_accuracy" REAL /* Score for accuracy of the listing */,
  "review_scores_cleanliness" REAL /* Score for cleanliness of the property */,
  "review_scores_checkin" REAL /* Score for check-in process */,
  "review_scores_communication" REAL /* Score for communication with the host */,
  "review_scores_location" REAL /* Score for location */,
  "review_scores_value" REAL /* Score for value */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the property */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews per month */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date of check-in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date of check-out */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the booking */,
  "booked_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guest's phone is verified */,
  "profile_picture" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guest has a profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES booking ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., view_properties, manage_bookings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
